scripts.theme:pull: sh -c 'set -a; . shopify/.env.shopify; set +a; shopify theme pull --path=shopify'
scripts.theme:push: sh -c 'set -a; . shopify/.env.shopify; set +a; shopify theme push --path=shopify --allow-live --nodelete'
scripts.theme:dev: sh -c 'set -a; . shopify/.env.shopify; set +a; shopify theme dev --path=shopify'
